name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement for GitHub Smart Downloader"

labels: enhancement

---

## 💡 The Idea

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## ❓ Why is this needed?

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the value it adds to your workflow.
_Example: "I want to be able to [...] because [...]"_

## ✨ Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of how you imagine this feature working.

## 🛤️ Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, sketches, or screenshots about the feature request here.
